articles.description: Billionaire venture capitalist Chamath Palihapitiya says leading digital asset Bitcoin (BTC) should be regulated like a security. In a new interview on the All-In Podcast, Palihapitiya says regulatory agencies and lawmakers should treat the top crypto asset like a security even though it may not necessarily be one. “I tend to think at this point […]

articles.title: Crypto Firms In The US Have Paid Over $3 Billion In Fines With The SEC Being The Largest Collector
articles.description: Crypto firms have paid over $3 billion in fines to US authorities since Satoshi Nakamoto launched Bitcoin. BlockFi was slammed with the largest fine after it paid $100 million early in the year. Payment of fines suggests that the cryptocurrency industry is not as unregulated as critics paint it to be. The US Securities and […]

articles.title: Circle’s CEO Quells USDC Fears, States the Company Is Financially Strong
articles.description: Summary: Circle’s CEO has published a Twitter thread quelling fears and rumors that USDC is on the brink of collapse. He added that it is understandable why the crypto community would worry about USDC, given the recent collapse of several crypto projects. He reaffirms Circle is committed to being transparent with its reserves fully backed, and Circle is at the strongest it has ever been...

articles.title: CFTC Unveils $1,700,000,000 Bitcoin Trading Scheme Allegations in Largest-Ever Charge Involving BTC
articles.description: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CTFC) is charging a South African trading company using Bitcoin (BTC) as its base currency for allegedly running the largest-ever BTC trading scheme. According to a new statement by CTFC Commissioner Kristin Johnson, the regulatory agency is filing a civil enforcement action against Mirror Trading International Proprietary Limited and its […]

articles.description: On Saturday, Johnny Lyu, Co-Founder and CEO of crypto exchange KuCoin, said that there was “no ‘immense suffer’ from any ‘coin collapse’, “no plan to halt withdrawal,” and that “everything on KuCoin is operating well.” KuCoin, which was launched in September 2017, has its operational headquarters in Seychelles.
